title: Luffy Gear 4 (NO SFX) (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces SP and SPTW skin1 with Luffy Gear 4 (no custom sfx) (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces SP and SPTW skin1 with Luffy Gear 4

Seen in One Piece and Your Bizarre Adventure

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stand

(DOES NOT HAVE CUSTOM SOUNDS, HAS REGULAR SP AND SPTW SOUNDS.)

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/luffy-gear-4-(jcraft-eoe)
Custom sounds version

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
